vulnerability.title: Ensure nss-tools is installed
vulnerability.description: The nss-tools package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install nss-tools
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: if ! rpm -q --quiet "nss-tools" ; then dnf install -y "nss-tools" fi

triage_decision.reason: Installing the nss-tools package adds only utility libraries and command-line tools for Network Security Services; it does not modify authentication, networking, or filesystem configurations and poses negligible risk of lockout or service disruption.

llm_verdict.message:
</tool_call> XML tags? The description says: Function calls MUST follow the specified format: an inner <function=...></function> block must be nested within <tool_call></tool_call> XML tags.

Thus we need to output XML-like: 

<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Install nss-tools package using dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>

Probably need exactly that.

Let's produce:

<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Install nss-tools package using dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>

Make sure no extra text.


<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Install nss-tools package using dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
